library: JRL · ספריית קיימברידג' · ספריית קיימברידג' · ספריית קיימברידג'
collection: JRL ; CUL, T-S ; CUL, T-S ; CUL, T-S
description:
Legal document. Record of release; partnership renewal. Written in the hand of Hillel b. ʿEli (fl. 1066–1108 CE). Amat al-Qādir, widow of Shela, and her son Yefet (possibly a minor), release ʿArūs b. Yosef from a partnership he had with Shela.

Amat al-Qādir seems to be acting as trustee for her son, but also seems to have a financial interest in the partnership; since she would not have ordinarily inherited from her husband, her equity in the partnership may represent payment of her ketubba. The widow and son are to receive two thirds of the profits from the investment, and ʿArūs is to receive the balance "as a claim for his service". Following the commenda model, ʿArūs assumes no responsibility for loss. ʿArūs is to travel between Fusṭāṭ and Yemen with the funds and has discretion in choosing the commodities he trades; he promises that he will work "with caution ... as if [he] were working with [his] own assets." (Information in part from Lieberman, "A Partnership Culture," 122.)

This document was mistakenly identified as a join with T-S 16.23 (PGPID 7850) in Goitein, Med Soc III (viii,C,3, n. 24), and it was also treated as such in Lieberman, "A Partnership Culture," 122. In fact, these are two copies of the same document.

Joins: Alan Elbaum.

Fragment from a legal document. (Information from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי. פרוטוקול שחרור וחידוש שותפות. נכתב בכתב ידו של הלל בן עלי (פעיל 1066–1108 לספירה). עמת אל-קאדר, אלמנתו של שלא, ובנה יפת, משחררים את ערוס בן יוסף משותפות שקיים עם שלא. האלמנה והבן יקבלו שני שלישים מן הרווחים, וערוס יקבל את היתרה כשכר על שירותיו. ערוס אינו נושא באחריות להפסדים, ועליו לנסוע בין פסטאט לתימן עם הכספים, תוך הבטחה לפעול 'בזהירות... כאילו עובד עם נכסיו שלו'.
